product_overview: TeamDynamics simulates multi-agent team behavior under crisis so users can assemble AI agents, run real-time simulations, and get post-simulation analytics to surface breaking points and actionable recommendations.
core_goals: Create and manage simulations that model team reactions to crisis scenarios
Assemble and customize a roster of personality-driven AI agents to test team composition
Run live, round-based simulations with real-time chat and intervene in-flight
Review post-simulation reports with executive summary, timeline charts, and per-agent analysis
Quickly start demos or experiments from the landing page using the pressure simulator

features.name: Landing Page Pressure Simulator
features.description: Interactive hero that lets visitors explore pressure impact visually and jump into setup or demo reports.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Drag pressure slider from calm to high -> Observe headline color and floating stats change
Navigate to / -> Drag pressure slider to desired level -> Choose Run First Simulation CTA -> Navigate to /setup
Navigate to / -> Click Live Demo Report CTA -> Navigate to /report
Navigate to / -> Toggle theme between dark and light mode -> Observe UI theme change

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with name, email, and a secure password so you can save simulations and consume credits.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill full name -> Fill email -> Fill password (min 6 characters) -> Submit registration form -> Redirect to /dashboard on success
Navigate to /register -> Fill name and email with an address already in use -> Fill password -> Submit registration form -> See error message on duplicate email or validation failure

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password to access your dashboard, simulation history, and credits.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> Redirect to /dashboard on success
Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Toggle password visibility -> Submit login form -> Redirect to /dashboard on success

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Central place to view simulation history, credits, and start or resume simulations.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View total simulations, completed, running stats and credits remaining
Navigate to /dashboard -> Choose to create a new simulation -> Navigate to /setup
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select a simulation from the history list to open its live view -> Navigate to /simulation
Navigate to /dashboard -> Toggle theme between dark and light mode -> Observe UI theme change

features.name: Simulation Setup Wizard (3-step)
features.description: Guided multi-step flow to configure company profile, inject or generate a crisis, build the agent roster, and set simulation parameters before launch.
user_flows: Navigate to /setup -> Fill company name and culture description
Navigate to /setup -> Select a pre-built crisis scenario or enter a custom crisis description
Navigate to /setup -> Use Auto-Generate to create a tailored crisis based on company profile -> Apply generated crisis to setup
Navigate to /setup -> Upload a document for AI analysis -> Apply document suggestions to populate crisis and agent suggestions
Navigate to /setup -> Add preset agents from the pool to the active roster -> Create a custom agent with name, role and personality sliders -> View agent personality radar chart
Navigate to /setup -> Adjust duration slider and pacing speed -> Review estimated API calls and cost
Navigate to /setup -> Submit simulation configuration to launch -> Redirect to /simulation

features.name: Live Simulation
features.description: Run simulations in real time with a Slack-like message feed, agent internal thoughts, per-agent metrics, and God Mode interventions.
user_flows: Navigate to /simulation -> Watch real-time agent messages stream into the chat feed
Navigate to /simulation -> Observe agent public messages and internal thoughts displayed distinctly
Navigate to /simulation -> Monitor morale, stress, loyalty and productivity metrics for agents
Navigate to /simulation -> Trigger a God Mode intervention (morale boost, pizza party, cancel overtime, or custom) -> Observe intervention announced in the feed and metrics update
Navigate to /simulation -> When simulation completes choose to view the report -> Navigate to /report

features.name: Simulation Report
features.description: Post-simulation analytics that provide an executive summary, agent breakdowns, timeline charts, AI recommendations, and PDF export.
user_flows: Navigate to /report -> View the executive summary and critical findings
Navigate to /report -> Inspect key metrics and individual agent performance cards
Navigate to /report -> View the timeline chart of morale, stress, and output over rounds
Navigate to /report -> Export the report as a PDF

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Allow users to switch between dark and light UI themes across the app for readability and preference.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle theme between dark and light mode -> Observe immediate UI theme change
Navigate to /dashboard -> Toggle theme between dark and light mode -> Observe immediate UI theme change

routes.description: Landing page with interactive pressure slider, feature highlights, and CTA buttons
User login page with email/password and Google OAuth
User registration page with name, email, and password
User dashboard showing simulation history, stats, credits, and new simulation button
Multi-step simulation configuration wizard (company profile, agent roster, simulation params)
Live simulation view with real-time WebSocket agent chat, metrics, and God Mode interventions
Post-simulation report with executive summary, agent analysis, timeline chart, and PDF export
Documentation page explaining the simulation engine architecture

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with name, email, and password (min 6 chars)
user_interactions: See error message on duplicate email or validation failure

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Google OAuth Login
features.description: Login or register using Google OAuth token client

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: View simulation history, quick stats, credits, and create new simulations
user_interactions: View total simulations, completed, running stats
Click New Simulation button to go to /setup
Click on a simulation card to view/resume it

features.name: Simulation Setup Wizard
features.description: Multi-step wizard to configure company profile, assemble agent team, and set simulation parameters
user_interactions: Step 1: Fill company name and culture description
Step 1: Select a crisis scenario from dropdown or enter custom crisis
Step 1: Click Auto-Generate button to AI-generate a crisis
Step 1: Upload a document for AI analysis (drag-drop or click)
Step 1: Apply document suggestions to setup
Step 2: Click preset agents from pool to add to roster
Step 2: Create custom agent with name, role, personality sliders
Step 2: Edit or remove agents from roster
Step 2: View agent personality radar chart
Step 3: View estimated API calls and cost

features.name: Live Simulation
features.description: Real-time simulation with WebSocket-powered agent chat, metrics dashboard, and God Mode interventions
user_interactions: Watch real-time agent messages appear in chat feed
View agent internal thoughts vs public messages
Monitor morale, stress, loyalty, productivity metrics per agent
Use God Mode to send interventions (morale boost, fire agent, etc.)
Navigate to report when simulation completes

features.name: Simulation Report
features.description: Post-simulation analytics report with executive summary, agent breakdown, timeline chart, and PDF export
user_interactions: View executive summary and critical findings
View key metrics (agents, morale, stress, productivity)
View timeline chart of morale, stress, and output over rounds

features.name: Landing Page Pressure Simulator
features.description: Interactive landing page with pressure slider that dynamically changes UI colors and animations
user_interactions: Watch headline color change from calm to warning
Toggle theme between dark and light mode

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Dark/light mode toggle available on landing page and dashboard
user_interactions: Click sun/moon icon to toggle theme

known_limitations.issue: Google OAuth requires GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable to be configured
known_limitations.impact: Google login button shows error if NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is not set in .env.local

known_limitations.issue: Simulation setup page does not require authentication
known_limitations.impact: Users can access setup without logging in, though credit deduction requires auth

known_limitations.issue: Demo report data is hardcoded in the backend
known_limitations.impact: The /report?id=demo route returns static demo data, not from a real simulation
